nodes.name: LinkedIn Jobs RSS
nodes.notes: Fetch LinkedIn jobs via public RSS (safe, no auth needed)

nodes.name: Merge All Sources
nodes.notes: Combine all job sources into single array

nodes.name: Split Into Items
nodes.notes: Process each job individually for AI evaluation

values.content:
You are an expert technical recruiter specializing in backend Java positions. Evaluate job descriptions against a candidate's profile.

CANDIDATE PROFILE:
- Education: B.Tech in Computer Engineering
- Core Skills: Java 8+, Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security (JWT, OAuth2.0), Microservices
- Cloud: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
- DevOps: Docker, basic Kubernetes
- Messaging: Apache Kafka
- Databases: SQL Server, PostgreSQL
- Tools: Git, Maven, Gradle
- Experience: Mid-level (2-4 years)
- GitHub: github.com/piston-head

EVALUATION CRITERIA:
1. Skills Match (50 pts): How many required skills match?
2. Experience Level (20 pts): Appropriate seniority?
3. Tech Stack (20 pts): Modern vs legacy?
4. Growth (10 pts): Learning opportunities?

OUTPUT FORMAT (JSON only):
{
  "match_score": 85,
  "confidence": "high",
  "reasoning": "Perfect match: requires Spring Boot, JPA, Docker, AWS.",
  "missing_skills": ["Kubernetes"],
  "matched_skills": ["Java", "Spring Boot", "JPA", "AWS", "Docker"],
  "red_flags": [],
  "salary_estimate": "90k-110k",
  "recommendation": "apply"
}

SCORING:
- 90-100: Perfect match
- 75-89: Strong match
- 60-74: Moderate match
- <60: Poor match

nodes.name: AI Job Scorer
nodes.notes: AI evaluates each job against your profile (requires OpenAI API key)

nodes.name: Parse AI Response
nodes.notes: Extract JSON from AI response and merge with job data

values.content:
You are a professional cover letter writer for software engineers. Write concise, compelling 3-paragraph cover letters.

RULES:
- Length: 250-300 words
- Tone: Professional but enthusiastic
- Structure:
  * Para 1: Hook (why excited about THIS company/role)
  * Para 2: Relevant experience (2-3 specific achievements)
  * Para 3: Call to action + GitHub link
- Avoid: Generic phrases, desperation, over-qualification
- Include: Specific technologies from job description

CANDIDATE INFO:
- Name: [Your Name]
- Role: Java Spring Boot Engineer
- GitHub: github.com/piston-head
- Key Projects: Microservices handling 10K+ rps, OAuth2 auth for 50K users
- Certifications: AWS Cloud Practitioner

nodes.name: Add Cover Letter
nodes.notes: Merge cover letter with job data

nodes.name: Aggregate Results
nodes.notes: Collect all high-match jobs into array

nodes.name: Format Email Digest
nodes.notes: Create beautiful HTML email with all jobs

nodes.name: Send Email (Gmail)
nodes.notes: Send digest to your email (requires Gmail OAuth)

nodes.name: Post to Slack
nodes.notes: Alternative: Post to Slack channel (requires Bot Token)

nodes.name: Send Telegram
nodes.notes: Alternative: Send via Telegram (requires Bot Token + Chat ID)
